failedAssertions.reason: Persona context is built correctly from profile, sessions, semantic_assertions. However, llama3.2:latest does not incorporate past context into AI responses - gives generic stoic quotes instead of referencing previous conversations.

AI does NOT reference previous conversations. Despite memory storage working (psych_updates, semantic_assertions) and persona context being built, llama3.2:latest gives generic responses without referencing past topics.

appliedUpdates.description: Confirmed memory system validation approach - API testing via curl works well for memory assertions

notes: The memory storage system (psych_updates, semantic_assertions, persona context building) works correctly. The issue is that llama3.2:latest model does not demonstrate memory by referencing past conversations - it gives generic stoic responses instead. This appears to be a model capability issue rather than an implementation bug.
